buildCommand: npx prisma generate && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https: wss:; frame-src 'self' https:; media-src 'self' https:;
